markets.rules_primary: If Leo Rivas records 3+ total bases in the Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Leo Rivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Leo Rivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Leo Rivas: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Leo Rivas records 2+ total bases in the Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Leo Rivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Leo Rivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Leo Rivas records 3+ hits in the Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Leo Rivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Leo Rivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If Leo Rivas records 2+ hits in the Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Leo Rivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Leo Rivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Leo Rivas: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Leo Rivas records 1+ hits in the Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Leo Rivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Leo Rivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Leo Rivas: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Leo Rivas records 1+ home runs in Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Leo Rivas is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Leo Rivas is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Leo Rivas is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
